events.name: dust_storm
events.description: The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.

events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

events.name: resource_strike
events.description: A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
